use_cases: Landing page hero section background with dynamic animated shapes
Loading state or skeleton animation for any web application
Decorative section divider or accent element
Portfolio or creative website background animations
Brand presentation backgrounds with morphing geometric elements
ai_summary: A decorative animated SVG component that continuously morphs polygon shapes between random geometric configurations using anime.js. The animation generates varying polygon point counts and smoothly transitions between shapes with circular easing, creating organic, evolving geometry suitable for landing pages, backgrounds, or visual accents in web applications.
